title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: Trader loses $1M after signing phishing token approval
summary: Onchain scammers netted more than $14 billion last year, and approval phishing remains a primary attack vector.

title: Crypto could benefit if Fed steps in to backstop US stock market: Analysts
summary: The size and scope of the US stock market “gives policymakers a strong incentive to backstop major drawdowns,” said Bitget Wallet COO, Alvin Kan.

title: Despite ‘misgivings,’ judge approves Elon Musk’s $1.5M SEC settlement
summary: The saga of Musk's tussle with the SEC over how he disclosed his growing stake in Twitter (now X) has come to an end.

title: Lovable reportedly in talks to double its valuation to $13.2B
summary: The $300 million round is expected to be led by Menlo Ventures, Sifted reported.

title: The New Grok 4.5 Is Out. Elon Musk Says It Competes With Last Year's Claude Opus
summary: SpaceXAI's new coding model is cheaper and faster than Anthropic and OpenAI's flagships—and by Musk's own account, at least one generation behind them.

title: ispace to send larger payloads to the moon on SpaceX’s Starship
summary:
Japanese lunar exploration company ispace is buying space on a future Starship lunar lander mission to deliver larger payloads to the moon.
The post ispace to send larger payloads to the moon on SpaceX’s Starship appeared first on SpaceNews.

title: Tokenized stock transfers surge 105% in a month to $8.4B
summary: Industry data shows trading activity and market value accelerating as crypto companies and traditional financial institutions expand tokenized equity initiatives.

title: SpaceXAI releases Grok 4.5, which Elon describes as an ‘Opus-class model’
summary: Elon Musk's tech company released the newest version of Grok on Wednesday, promising a cheaper, more efficient alternative to other powerful AI models.

title: Officials set to revise MiCA to cover non-EU stablecoin issuers: Report
summary: EU officials reportedly plan to consider changes to the Markets in Crypto-Assets framework, dubbed by some as “MiCA 2.0,” in response to a US stablecoin law and rules on tokenized payments and deposits.

title: Elon Musk says X will send DMs when posts you’ve engaged with are corrected
summary: X plans to send users direct messages when posts they’ve liked, replied to, or reposted receive Community Notes, an update aimed at addressing criticism that the platform’s crowdsourced fact-checking system often arrives too late to curb misinformation.

title: Stablecoin-settled TradFi perpetual trading tops $1.1T: Binance Research
summary: A new Binance Research report said stablecoins are fast becoming a preferred settlement layer for tokenized TradFi markets while gaining traction in payments and savings.

title: OpenAI releases new voice models for more natural live conversations
summary: OpenAI says its new voice mode can speak and listen at the same time, a key ability for live translation.

title: The 5 types of real world assets being tokenized fastest onchain
summary: Tokenized Real World Assets span treasuries, real estate, stocks, commodities and private credit. The sector is still small in TradFi terms but it's growing very, very fast.

title: Fi expands Starlink direct-to-device capability into dog-tracking
summary:
Pet technology company Fi launched a dog tracker July 8 that uses T-Mobile’s Starlink-enabled T-Satellite service to remain connected across the United States, even outside the telco’s terrestrial network.

title: Anthropic Removes Hidden Claude Code Tracker After Researchers Raise Privacy Concerns
summary: The company says the tool was designed to stop abuse and AI model extraction, but critics questioned the use of undisclosed monitoring.

title: China May Be Following US Lead With Quiet Crackdown on AI Exports
summary: China is reportedly building the same power to cut off its AI that the US deployed against Anthropic in June.

title: Apolink makes contact with first relay satellite
summary:
Apolink has made contact with its first satellite after launching on SpaceX’s July 7 rideshare mission, clearing the way for a data relay demonstration using a novel experimental license from the Federal Communications Commission.
